name: the-pit
description: The Pit — decentralized Nostr-style social network with creator revenue sharing

scripts.build: npm run build -w @thepit/core && npm run build -w @thepit/relay -w @thepit/aggregator -w @thepit/web
scripts.dev: concurrently -n relay,web,agg -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev -w @thepit/relay" "npm run dev -w @thepit/web" "npm run dev -w @thepit/aggregator"
